events.headline: TRUMP SAYS ‘MANY COUNTRIES’ WILL SEND WARSHIPS TO HORMUZ AMID IRAN BLOCKADE
events.detail: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies' during war.

events.headline: OIL TANKER ATTACKED OFF RUSSIAN COAST
events.detail: A Greek-flagged oil tanker was attacked by a “missile or a drone” off the Russian Black Sea coast, the shipping ministry in Athens has said Read Full Article at RT.com

events.headline: HAMAS URGES KEY ALLY IRAN TO HALT ATTACKS ON GULF STATES
events.detail: The Palestinian group also affirms Tehran's right to defend itself from "aggression" by the US and Israel.

events.headline: TRUMP DEMANDS CHINA, OTHER NATIONS DEPLOY WARSHIPS TO STRAIT OF HORMUZ (PHOTOS,
events.detail: The US-Israeli attack on Iran is entering its third week with continuing long-range strikes and an escalating war of words on both sides Read Full Article at RT.com

events.headline: IRÁN DESAFÍA A LA POTENTE ARMADA DE ESTADOS UNIDOS EN UNA BATALLA NAVAL ASIMÉTRI
events.detail: El control iraní del estrecho de Ormuz, un flanco vulnerable a posible ataques con drones o lanchas rápidas, y el riesgo al minado de las aguas, dificulta la entrada en acción de las fragatas estadoun

events.headline: EL GOLFO BUSCA EN UCRANIA LOS CODICIADOS DRONES STING PARA DEFENDERSE DE IRÁN
events.detail: Estados Unidos y otros países han solicitado a Kiev este aparato con más del 80% de efectividad para derribar los Shahed iraníes y sus variantes
